title: Color Theme - Switching theme while Phone is set to Light Theme
scenario: Color Theme selection (Follow Phone Theme, Light, Dark) applies immediately across all app screens, persists after app restart, and tapping the currently selected theme does nothing
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on a connected Poly Bluetooth audio device.
2. Navigate to Home → Account → Color Theme.
3. Tap 'Follow Phone Theme' and observe the check mark moves to this option.

4. Verify the theme is applied immediately across all app screens: Home, Device Settings, Audio Settings, ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer, Notifications, DFU screens, Poly Lens Menu, User Guides, and Onboardings.
5. Return to Account → Color Theme and tap 'Light Theme'.
6. Verify the check mark moves to 'Light Theme' and the theme is applied immediately across all app screens (same list as step 4).
7. Return to Account → Color Theme and tap 'Dark Theme'.
8. Verify the check mark moves to 'Dark Theme' and the theme is applied immediately across all app screens (same list as step 4).
9. Close and restart the Poly Studio Mobile app.
10. Navigate to Account → Color Theme and verify the previously selected theme (e.g., Dark Theme) is still selected and the check mark is on that option.
11. Verify that all app screens still reflect the persisted theme after restart.
12. Tap the currently selected theme option again (e.g., tap 'Dark Theme' when it is already selected).
13. Verify that nothing changes — the check mark stays on the same option and the theme does not toggle or change.
expected: The selected color theme is applied immediately across all app screens. The check mark moves correctly between options. The chosen theme persists after app restart. Tapping the currently selected theme does nothing.
